name: Reliance on IP Address for Authentication
description: The product uses an IP address for authentication. IP addresses can be easily spoofed by attackers, making them unreliable as a sole authentication mechanism and allowing unauthorized access through forged source addresses.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (authentication decision, access control check) that rely solely on INGRESS metadata (source IP address, remote address) without a secondary AUTH mediator (cryptographic authentication, credential verification, multi-factor check) that provides a stronger, non-spoofable form of identity verification.
